items.title_en: World Bank president: Prepare for months of disruption, even after Hormuz Strait reopens
items.title_zh: 世界银行行长：即使霍尔木兹海峡重新开放，也要为数月的混乱做好准备
items.desc_en: It will take "a few months for things to come back" once the Strait of Hormuz is no longer effectively closed, Banga said.
items.desc_zh: 班加说，一旦霍尔木兹海峡不再有效关闭，“情况将需要几个月的时间才能恢复”。

items.title_en: Two Wall Street analysts are getting bullish on a Target turnaround. Here's why
items.title_zh: 两位华尔街分析师越来越看好塔吉特的扭亏为盈。这就是为什么
items.desc_en: Target shares are soaring in 2026, and that trend could get a boost as the retailer revamps its stores, analysts said.
items.desc_zh: 分析师表示，2026 年 Target 股价将飙升，随着该零售商改造门店，这一趋势可能会得到提振。

items.title_en: Tesla stock pops as Elon Musk touts chip progress
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克吹捧芯片进展，特斯拉股价上涨
items.desc_en: UBS analysts changed their previously bearish rating on shares of Tesla this week.
items.desc_zh: 瑞银分析师本周改变了此前对特斯拉股票的看跌评级。

items.title_en: Anthropic products are operational after brief outage, status page says

items.desc_en: Anthropic said it is working to "fully resolve this issue," according to its page showing the status of the Claude chatbot, Claude Code and the API.
items.desc_zh: Anthropic 表示，根据其显示 Claude 聊天机器人、Claude 代码和 API 状态的页面，该公司正在努力“完全解决这个问题”。

items.title_en: White House budget chief Russell Vought won't estimate Iran war cost in testimony
items.title_zh: 白宫预算主管拉塞尔·沃特不会在证词中估计伊朗战争成本
items.desc_en: Office of Management and Budget Director Russell Vought testified before the House Budget Committee on Wednesday.
items.desc_zh: 管理和预算办公室主任拉塞尔·沃特周三在众议院预算委员会作证。

items.title_en: Iran team is 'coming for sure' to 2026 World Cup in U.S., says FIFA President Infantino
items.title_zh: 国际足联主席因凡蒂诺表示，伊朗队“肯定会”参加 2026 年美国世界杯
items.desc_en: Amid war with the U.S., Iran's participation in the World Cup is uncertain. But FIFA President Gianni Infantino tells CNBC they will play in North America.
items.desc_zh: 在与美国的战争中，伊朗能否参加世界杯还存在不确定性。但国际足联主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺告诉 CNBC，他们将在北美比赛。

items.title_en: SantaCon promoter arrested for charity fraud, New York federal prosecutors say

items.desc_en: More than 25,000 people dressed as Santa Claus and other Christmas characters pass through New York bars in an annual event meant to raise money for charity.

items.title_en: Airline stocks rebounded as oil pulled back. Why the rally may not last

items.title_zh: 坎耶·维斯特 (Kanye West) 推迟法国演出，直至另行通知
items.desc_en: It comes a week after the UK announced it would block the rapper from entering the country, where he was due to headline a music festival in summer.
items.desc_zh: 一周前，英国宣布将阻止这位说唱歌手进入该国，他原定于夏季在英国的一场音乐节上担任主角。

items.title_en: Trump takes aim at Pope Leo again, days after calling him 'weak on crime' - CNBC
items.title_zh: 特朗普在称教皇利奥“打击犯罪软弱”几天后再次瞄准教皇利奥 - CNBC
items.desc_en: Trump takes aim at Pope Leo again, days after calling him 'weak on crime'  CNBCAfter Trump’s latest broadside, Pope says ‘world needs to hear’ message of peace  CNNOpinion | Trump’s Blasphemy Is a War
items.desc_zh: 特朗普再次瞄准教皇利奥，几天前，CNBC 称他“在犯罪方面软弱”。在特朗普最新猛烈抨击后，教皇表示“世界需要听到”和平的信息。特朗普的亵渎是一场战争

items.title_en: Australia's richest person must share part of her mining fortunes, court rules
items.title_zh: 法院规定，澳大利亚首富必须分享部分矿业财富
items.desc_en: The long-running legal dispute is over a lucrative iron ore project in the top west corner of Australia.
items.desc_zh: 这场长期的法律纠纷是围绕澳大利亚西北部一个利润丰厚的铁矿石项目展开的。

items.title_zh: 韩国因公共滋扰罪入狱美国 YouTuber
items.desc_en: Johnny Somali sparked outrage after kissing a statue representing World War Two sex slaves.
items.desc_zh: 约翰尼·索马里在亲吻代表第二次世界大战性奴隶的雕像后引发了愤怒。

items.desc_zh: 联合国称，这艘拖网渔船“据报道因强风、波涛汹涌的海面和过度拥挤而沉没”。
